name: Little Wings Deliveries
developer: SkyBrave, Vort Digital, Jonathan Kihlström, Mount West Music
short_description: Embark on a short, playful adventure in your cozy flying boat and sail through fluffy clouds. Discover floating islands and befriend their quirky citizens. Jump, roll, climb, and skate through Cloudburg as Skye faces her biggest obstacle on her way to the Royal Postal Academy!
detailed_description:
Little Wings Deliveries

Embark on a short, playful adventure in your cozy flying boat and sail through fluffy clouds. Discover floating islands and befriend their quirky citizens. Jump, roll, climb, and skate through Cloudburg as Skye faces her biggest obstacle on her way to the Royal Postal Academy!

Little Features:

  • ⏰ Around 30 minutes to 1 hour of playtime!

  • ☁️ Sail through the clouds with your flying boat!

  • 🏝️ Explore 5 different tiny flying islands!

  • 🤪 Meet a small cast of quirky characters!

  • 🎒 Collect cool items like a skateboard, selfie stick, and more!

⚠️ Attention: This game is digestible 😋🍴

We're TENSTACK! A small collective of game makers creating lots of creative and 'digestible' games. A digestible game respects its players' money and time, is designed around a single idea, and doesn’t overstay its welcome. We want you to be able to finish our games in just a couple of sessions—without ever making you feel stuffed, so to say.

supported_languages:
English*, German*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America*, Russian*, Turkish*
*languages with full audio support
